description_long: This object is a rectangular book with a clean, minimalist design. The front cover is plain and light-colored, with bold, hand-drawn text running vertically. The back cover mirrors the front in style, also featuring hand-drawn text. The spine is narrow and displays vertically oriented text, matching the cover's handwritten aesthetic. The book appears to have a hard, smooth surface, likely a hardcover edition. There are no visible illustrations, logos, or decorative elements beyond the text.
description: A rectangular, hardbound book with plain light covers and bold, hand-drawn text on the front, back, and spine. The design is minimalist with no visible illustrations or logos.
description_view_0: The front cover is visible, featuring vertically arranged, hand-drawn text on a plain light background.
description_view_1: The spine is shown, displaying vertically oriented handwritten text on a narrow, light-colored surface.
description_view_2: The back cover is visible, similar to the front, with hand-drawn text on a plain background.
description_view_3: The opposite edge of the spine is shown, again with vertically arranged handwritten text.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is light-colored with vertically oriented, hand-drawn black text. There are no decorative elements or patterns.
